card.oneLiner: For executors and families settling an estate. It walks you through the whole job, first days through closing.
bullets: Asset, debt & expense registers with running totals

hero.headline: You've never settled an estate before. It knows that.
hero.lede: A private, offline app that walks executors and families through the whole job — 47 guided tasks, the registers your attorney will ask for, and every dollar tracked. Nothing you type ever leaves your device.
hero.note: Instant download · No subscription · No account · Works on Mac, Windows, tablets & phones
hero.imageAlt: Estate Settlement Companion showing tasks and running totals

intro.heading: The whole job, in the right order
intro.body: Settling an estate is dozens of tasks nobody hands you a list for. The Companion is that list — first days through final distribution — with the registers your attorney and the court will actually ask to see.

features.title: 47 guided tasks
features.body: Four phases, from the first days through closing the estate. Every task explains what it is and why it matters, in plain English.

features.title: Asset & debt registers
features.body: Bank and investment accounts, property, vehicles, and every debt and expense — with running totals the estate accounting needs.

features.title: Every dollar tracked
features.body: Money in, money out, and what's left. The numbers stay reconciled so nothing surprises you at distribution.

features.title: Key people & contacts
features.body: Beneficiaries, the attorney, the accountant, the institutions you'll call again and again — one list, always current.

features.title: The attorney summary
features.body: One click compiles the whole picture into a printable summary you can hand to the professionals — which is how you keep their bills small.

features.title: Auto-save & backup
features.body: Your work saves automatically to your device. Export a backup file whenever you like; restore it on any computer.

screens.caption: Every step, first days through closing.
Nothing you enter leaves your device.
Not a PDF, not a spreadsheet.

privacy.heading: Private by design, not by promise
privacy.body: You'll be recording account numbers, balances, and beneficiaries. That information should never touch the internet. In this app, it can't.

cards.title: Zero network requests
cards.body: The app is a single file that runs entirely in your browser, on your device. It makes no connections and loads nothing from the internet. You can run it with Wi-Fi off.

cards.title: We couldn't see your data if we wanted to
cards.body: No account, no login, no cloud, no sync. Nothing you type is transmitted anywhere. Your backup is a file on your own computer.

cards.title: Yours forever
cards.body: One-time purchase. The file is yours, works offline for life, and will still open years from now, exactly as it does today.

bullets: Asset, debt & expense registers with totals

faq.a: No. You pay $39 once and the app is yours forever. There is no account, no renewal, and nothing that expires.

faq.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a: No. You download a small file, double-click it, and it opens in the browser you already use — on Mac, Windows, tablets, and phones.

faq.q: Is this legal or financial advice?
faq.a: No. The Companion is an organizational tool. It gets the estate inventoried and tracked, and frames the right questions for your attorney and accountant.
Yes, structurally. The app makes zero network requests — you can verify this with Wi-Fi turned off. Your entries live only on your device, and your backup is a file you control.

faq.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
faq.a: Email hello@quietkeep.co and we'll make it right. We answer every message.

crossSell.heading: Planning ahead instead?
crossSell.body: The Estate Planning Organizer is this app's counterpart for getting your own affairs in order — so your family never has to go looking.
